name: The Dart Bank
description_short: Dart Bank is a full-service bank offering personal, commercial, and mortgage banking services with a focus on relationship-based service and community involvement since 1925.
description_long:
Dart Bank has operated as a community-focused financial institution since 1925, establishing itself as a relationship-driven bank committed to the markets it serves. The bank maintains a team of over 300 employees across multiple locations and emphasizes personalized service and deep community roots as core differentiators in the banking space.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking products including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (currently featuring a 6-month CD at 3.55% APY), mortgage services, and specialized business banking solutions. Their service portfolio extends to treasury management for businesses, escrow account management through their Secure Escrow product, mobile banking with check deposit capabilities, online banking access, and bill payment and fund transfer functionality. They also provide ATM access and support commercial customers with custom-tailored solutions designed around specific business needs.

Dart Bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on community engagement, noting "since 1925" heritage in marketing materials and highlighting extensive volunteer hours and donations to communities served. The bank positions relationship banking as a core value, contrasting with larger institutions. Their treasury management and business banking services are marketed as custom-tailored rather than one-size-fits-all, and they offer specialized products like Secure Escrow for business operations streamlining.

As a traditional bank, Dart Bank serves customers seeking FDIC-insured deposit products and conventional lending services. However, the website provides limited detail on interest rates beyond the CD special, lending criteria, fees, or competitive positioning on rates. Community bank status may mean fewer digital conveniences compared to neobanks, though mobile banking is available. The bank does not appear to specialize in credit-building products, alternative lending, or services for credit-challenged consumers. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Certificates of deposit (6-month CD at 3.55% APY)
Online banking portal with multi-device access
Mobile banking application with mobile check deposit
Bill payment and electronic fund transfers
Secure Escrow account management for business operations
Fraud prevention tools (check and ACH fraud prevention)
pros: FDIC-insured banking services with established 99-year history (since 1925)
Competitive CD rate of 3.55% APY on 6-month certificates
Mobile banking app with check deposit, bill pay, and fund transfers
Specialized treasury management and business banking with custom-tailored solutions
Secure Escrow product specifically designed to streamline business operations
Over 300 employees across multiple locations enabling relationship-based service
Active community involvement with documented volunteer and donation programs
cons: Website lacks fee transparency—no disclosed checking/savings account maintenance fees or minimum balances
Limited rate information beyond single CD special; no posted savings account or money market rates
No indication of specialized products for credit building, credit repair, or alternative lending
Community bank model may offer fewer digital conveniences and branch locations than national banks
Mortgage and business loan terms, rates, and qualification criteria not detailed on website
best_for: Small business owners seeking relationship banking and custom treasury management services
Community-oriented customers valuing local reinvestment and personalized service
Savers looking for FDIC protection and competitive CD rates with established bank stability
Businesses needing escrow account management and operational streamlining solutions
diagnosis: Dart Bank is best for small business owners, savers, and community-minded consumers seeking traditional, relationship-based banking with FDIC insurance and established stability. The main caveat is that detailed pricing, rates, and loan terms are not transparent on their website, requiring direct contact to compare competitiveness against other banks and credit unions.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
meta_description: Dart Bank offers personal, commercial, and mortgage banking services with a focus on relationship-based service and community involvement since 1925.
